project.description: 檢測外網user是否有今日日期的密碼變更做為系統是否正常的依據 若異常產製內外網job狀態的html發送mail

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail # === DB 參數（建議改用 Jenkins Credentials 或 ~/.pgpass）=== PGHOST="localhost" PGPORT="5432" PGDATABASE="idmdb" PGUSER="inidm" PGPASSWORD="inidm" # logs 的 schema（預設 inidm；可在 Jenkins 環境覆寫） STATUS_SCHEMA="${STATUS_SCHEMA:-inidm}" # 事件/稽核表名（如有不同可用環境變數覆寫） EVENTS_TABLE="${EVENTS_TABLE:-event_logs}" AUDIT_TABLE="${AUDIT_TABLE:-audit_logs}" # 健康視窗（分鐘，可覆寫，如 HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN=15） HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN="${HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN:-30}" # 事件表取回筆數上限（避免過大，必要時可覆寫） EVENT_LIMIT="${EVENT_LIMIT:-50}" echo "🔧 Preparing queries…" echo "📦 Using schema: ${STATUS_SCHEMA}" echo "🗂️ Using events table: ${EVENTS_TABLE}" echo "🗂️ Using audit table: ${AUDIT_TABLE}" # ---------- 小工具 ---------- run_psql() { PGPASSWORD="$PGPASSWORD" psql -h "$PGHOST" -p "$PGPORT" -U "$PGUSER" -d "$PGDATABASE" \ -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q -t -A -c "SET TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei'; $1" } get_col_type() { local schema="$1" table="$2" col="$3" dtype norm fqtn fqtn="${schema}.${table}" dtype="$(run_psql "SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='${schema}' AND table_name='${table}' AND column_name='${col}' LIMIT 1;" | tr -d '\r')" if [[ -z "${dtype:-}" ]]; then dtype="$(run_psql "SELECT pg_typeof(${col})::text FROM ${fqtn} LIMIT 1;" | tr -d '\r')" fi norm="$(echo "${dtype:-}" | tr -d '[:space:]' | tr 'A-Z' 'a-z')" case "$norm" in timestampwithtimezone|timestamptz) echo "tstz" ;; timestampwithouttimezone|timestamp|timestampwo*time*) echo "ts" ;; *) echo "ts" ;; esac } html_escape() { local s=${1//&/&} s=${s///>} s=${s//\"/"} printf '%s' "$s" } # 先做 HTML 轉義，再把 [[BR]] 還原為
（避免被 while 切行） escape_with_br() { local s; s="$(html_escape "$1")" s="${s//\[\[BR\]\]/
}" printf '%s' "$s" } # ---------- 解析完整表名 ---------- STATUS_FQTN="${STATUS_SCHEMA}.status_logs" EVENTS_FQTN="${STATUS_SCHEMA}.${EVENTS_TABLE}" AUDIT_FQTN="${STATUS_SCHEMA}.${AUDIT_TABLE}" # ---------- 型別偵測 ---------- PWDLASTSET_TYPE="$(get_col_type "inidm" "connector_space_ad_person_sync_details" "pwdlastset")" STARTDT_TYPE="$(get_col_type "${STATUS_SCHEMA}" "status_logs" "startdatetime")" EVENT_ACTDT_TYPE="$(get_col_type "${STATUS_SCHEMA}" "${EVENTS_TABLE}" "activitydatetime")" AUDIT_ACTDT_TYPE="$(get_col_type "${STATUS_SCHEMA}" "${AUDIT_TABLE}" "activitydatetime")" # ---------- 今天密碼變更筆數 ---------- if [[ "$PWDLASTSET_TYPE" == "ts" ]]; then COUNT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date)::timestamp AS start_ts, (((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date + 1)::timestamp) AS end_ts ) SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM inidm.connector_space_ad_person_sync_details, bounds WHERE pwdlastset >= start_ts AND pwdlastset < end_ts; " else COUNT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS start_tstz, (date_trunc('day', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') + interval '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS end_tstz ) SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM inidm.connector_space_ad_person_sync_details, bounds WHERE pwdlastset >= start_tstz AND pwdlastset < end_tstz; " fi echo "🔍 Checking pwdlastset (Asia/Taipei) on $(date)" COUNT="$(run_psql "$COUNT_SQL" | tr -d '[:space:]')" COUNT="${COUNT:-0}" echo "今天已有 ${COUNT} 筆使用者密碼變更記錄" # ---------- 健康狀態（status_logs） ---------- if [[ "$STARTDT_TYPE" == "ts" ]]; then STATUS_SQL=" SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, dn, displayname, to_char(startdatetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_tw, CASE WHEN COALESCE(health, '') = 'Y' THEN '正常' ELSE '異常' END AS op_status_label, CASE WHEN ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::timestamp - startdatetime) > interval '${HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN} minutes' THEN '異常' ELSE '正常' END AS time_health_label FROM ${STATUS_FQTN} ORDER BY region_label, dn, displayname, startdatetime DESC; " else STATUS_SQL=" SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, dn, displayname, to_char(startdatetime AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_tw, CASE WHEN COALESCE(health, '') = 'Y' THEN '正常' ELSE '異常' END AS op_status_label, CASE WHEN (now() - startdatetime) > interval '${HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN} minutes' THEN '異常' ELSE '正常' END AS time_health_label FROM ${STATUS_FQTN} ORDER BY region_label, dn, displayname, startdatetime DESC; " fi STATUS_ROWS="$( PGPASSWORD="$PGPASSWORD" psql -h "$PGHOST" -p "$PGPORT" -U "$PGUSER" -d "$PGDATABASE" \ -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q -t -A -F $'\t' \ -c "SET TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei'; $STATUS_SQL" )" # ---------- 事件紀錄（events）：把換行改成 [[BR]] ---------- if [[ "$EVENT_ACTDT_TYPE" == "ts" ]]; then EVENTS_SQL=" SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, dn, jobname, to_char(activitydatetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS act_tw, REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(exceptioncontent,''), E'\r\n', E'\n'), E'\n', '[[BR]]') AS exceptioncontent FROM ${EVENTS_FQTN} ORDER BY activitydatetime DESC LIMIT ${EVENT_LIMIT}; " else EVENTS_SQL=" SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, dn, jobname, to_char(activitydatetime AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS act_tw, REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(exceptioncontent,''), E'\r\n', E'\n'), E'\n', '[[BR]]') AS exceptioncontent FROM ${EVENTS_FQTN} ORDER BY activitydatetime DESC LIMIT ${EVENT_LIMIT}; " fi EVENTS_ROWS="$( PGPASSWORD="$PGPASSWORD" psql -h "$PGHOST" -p "$PGPORT" -U "$PGUSER" -d "$PGDATABASE" \ -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q -t -A -F $'\t' \ -c "SET TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei'; $EVENTS_SQL" )" # ---------- 稽核紀錄（audit：昨天；把換行改成 [[BR]]） ---------- if [[ "$AUDIT_ACTDT_TYPE" == "ts" ]]; then AUDIT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date - 1)::timestamp AS start_ts, ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date)::timestamp AS end_ts ) SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, activitydisplayname, to_char(activitydatetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS occ_tw, REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(additionaldetails,''), E'\r\n', E'\n'), E'\n', '[[BR]]') AS details FROM ${AUDIT_FQTN}, bounds WHERE activitydatetime >= start_ts AND activitydatetime < end_ts ORDER BY activitydatetime DESC; " AUDIT_COUNT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date - 1)::timestamp AS start_ts, ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')::date)::timestamp AS end_ts ) SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM ${AUDIT_FQTN}, bounds WHERE activitydatetime >= start_ts AND activitydatetime < end_ts; " else AUDIT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT (date_trunc('day', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') - interval '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS start_tstz, (date_trunc('day', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS end_tstz ) SELECT CASE WHEN region='inner' THEN '內網' WHEN region='external' THEN '外網' ELSE region END AS region_label, activitydisplayname, to_char(activitydatetime AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS occ_tw, REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(additionaldetails,''), E'\r\n', E'\n'), E'\n', '[[BR]]') AS details FROM ${AUDIT_FQTN}, bounds WHERE activitydatetime >= start_tstz AND activitydatetime < end_tstz ORDER BY activitydatetime DESC; " AUDIT_COUNT_SQL=" WITH bounds AS ( SELECT (date_trunc('day', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') - interval '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS start_tstz, (date_trunc('day', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei')) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei') AS end_tstz ) SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM ${AUDIT_FQTN}, bounds WHERE activitydatetime >= start_tstz AND activitydatetime < end_tstz; " fi AUDIT_COUNT="$(run_psql "$AUDIT_COUNT_SQL" | tr -d '[:space:]')" AUDIT_COUNT="${AUDIT_COUNT:-0}" echo "🧾 稽核紀錄（昨天）筆數：${AUDIT_COUNT}" AUDIT_ROWS="$( PGPASSWORD="$PGPASSWORD" psql -h "$PGHOST" -p "$PGPORT" -U "$PGUSER" -d "$PGDATABASE" \ -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q -t -A -F $'\t' \ -c "SET TIME ZONE 'Asia/Taipei'; $AUDIT_SQL" )" # ---------- 密碼變更筆數：0 ⇒ 整段紅字 ---------- if [[ "$COUNT" == "0" ]]; then COUNT_LINE_HTML='

今天密碼變更筆數：0 -> 請確認此狀況是否正常

' else COUNT_LINE_HTML="

今天密碼變更筆數：${COUNT}

" fi # ---------- 產生 email.html ---------- cat > email.html < IDM 帳號同步檢測

IDM 帳號同步檢測

${COUNT_LINE_HTML}

Schema：${STATUS_SCHEMA} ｜ Events Table：${EVENTS_TABLE} ｜ Audit Table：${AUDIT_TABLE} ｜ Job：${JOB_NAME:-N/A} #${BUILD_NUMBER:-N/A} ｜ 主控台：${BUILD_URL:-#}console

健康狀態一覽（健康門檻：>${HEALTH_WINDOW_MIN} 分鐘）

EOF # 健康狀態表格 while IFS=$'\t' read -r REGION_LABEL DN DISPLAY STARTTW OPSTATUS TIME_STATUS; do [[ -z "${REGION_LABEL}${DN}${DISPLAY}${STARTTW}${OPSTATUS}${TIME_STATUS}" ]] && continue OP_CLASS="ok"; [[ "$OPSTATUS" == "異常" ]] && OP_CLASS="bad" TIME_CLASS="ok"; [[ "$TIME_STATUS" == "異常" ]] && TIME_CLASS="bad" { echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " } >> email.html done <<< "$STATUS_ROWS" # 事件紀錄表 cat >> email.html <<'EOF'
場域 DN 作業名稱 最近執行時間（台北） 最後運行狀態 超時狀態
$(html_escape "$REGION_LABEL")$(html_escape "$DN")$(html_escape "$DISPLAY")$(html_escape "$STARTTW")$(html_escape "$OPSTATUS")$(html_escape "$TIME_STATUS")

事件紀錄

EOF EVENTS_ANY=0 while IFS=$'\t' read -r E_REGION E_DN E_JOB E_TIME E_EX; do [[ -z "${E_REGION}${E_DN}${E_JOB}${E_TIME}${E_EX}" ]] && continue EVENTS_ANY=1 { echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " } >> email.html done <<< "$EVENTS_ROWS" if [[ "$EVENTS_ANY" -eq 0 ]]; then { echo " " echo " " echo " " } >> email.html fi # 稽核紀錄表（昨天） cat >> email.html <<'EOF'
場域 DN 作業名稱 作業時間（台北） 異常內容
$(html_escape "$E_REGION")$(html_escape "$E_DN")$(html_escape "$E_JOB")$(html_escape "$E_TIME")$(escape_with_br "$E_EX")

稽核紀錄（昨天）

EOF AUDIT_ANY=0 while IFS=$'\t' read -r A_REGION A_NAME A_TIME A_DETAILS; do [[ -z "${A_REGION}${A_NAME}${A_TIME}${A_DETAILS}" ]] && continue AUDIT_ANY=1 { echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " echo " " } >> email.html done <<< "$AUDIT_ROWS" if [[ "$AUDIT_ANY" -eq 0 ]]; then { echo " " echo " " echo " " } >> email.html fi cat >> email.html <<'EOF'
場域 作業名稱 發生時間（台北） 作業內容
$(html_escape "$A_REGION")$(html_escape "$A_NAME")$(html_escape "$A_TIME")$(escape_with_br "$A_DETAILS")
EOF if [[ "$COUNT" == "0" ]]; then echo "❌ 今天沒有任何使用者密碼變更記錄，將結束為失敗以觸發通知。" exit 1 else echo "✅ 今天已有 ${COUNT} 筆 pwdlastset 記錄，已產出 email.html。" fi
